use_cases: A dynamic canvas-based bubble animation used as decorative backgrounds for hero sections and landing pages
An ambient animated background effect for websites to add visual interest and movement
A colorful floating particle animation for creative agency portfolios and campaign pages
A customizable bubble animation with configurable colors, sizes, and quantities for various design contexts
ai_summary: Canvas-based floating bubble animation featuring colorful circles with continuous motion and gradient backgrounds. Renders parametric bubbles with varying colors, radii, and positions using trigonometric functions, creating an ambient visual effect suitable for decorative backgrounds on landing pages and hero sections.
